category.id: {"en":"Grid-tied PV inverter","zh":"并网光伏逆变器","zht":"併網光伏逆變器"}
category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

title.en: China-to-Mexico Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入墨西哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入墨西哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against Mexican NOM electrical safety, NYCE/ANCE certification routes, CRE/CFE distributed-generation interconnection, and CONUEE energy-efficiency expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与墨西哥 NOM 电气安全、NYCE/ANCE 认证路径、CRE/CFE 分布式发电并网及 CONUEE 能效要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與墨西哥 NOM 電氣安全、NYCE/ANCE 認證路徑、CRE/CFE 分散式發電併網及 CONUEE 能效要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NOM certificate, CRE permit or exemption determination, CFE interconnection approval, customs determination, CONUEE ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Mexican NOMs, conformity-assessment procedures, grid-interconnection rules, utility requirements, customs rules, and energy-efficiency obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NOM 证书、CRE 许可或豁免裁定、CFE 并网批准、海关裁定、CONUEE 裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行墨西哥 NOM、合格评定程序、并网规则、电力公司要求、海关规则及能效义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NOM 證書、CRE 許可或豁免裁定、CFE 併網批准、海關裁定、CONUEE 裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行墨西哥 NOM、合格評定程序、併網規則、電力公司要求、海關規則及能效義務。

answer_first.en: Mexico is not a CE/CCC carry-over market: a China-origin grid-tied PV inverter normally needs NOM electrical-safety coverage through an approved certification body such as NYCE or ANCE where the product NOM applies, installation compliance with NOM-001-SEDE, separate CRE/CFE distributed-generation interconnection acceptance, and a CONUEE energy-efficiency scope check.
answer_first.zh: 墨西哥不能直接沿用 CE 或 CCC：中国产并网光伏逆变器通常需要在适用产品 NOM 时通过 NYCE 或 ANCE 等获批认证机构取得 NOM 电气安全覆盖，安装需符合 NOM-001-SEDE，并另行完成 CRE/CFE 分布式发电并网接受及 CONUEE 能效适用性核查。
answer_first.zht: 墨西哥不能直接沿用 CE 或 CCC：中國產併網光伏逆變器通常需要在適用產品 NOM 時通過 NYCE 或 ANCE 等獲批認證機構取得 NOM 電氣安全覆蓋，安裝需符合 NOM-001-SEDE，並另行完成 CRE/CFE 分散式發電併網接受及 CONUEE 能效適用性核查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Mexican regulator, DOF, gob.mx, standards authority, certification-body approval listing, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
